response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The first song in the reference JSON ('BLUE CLAPPER') was a complete mismatch; the actual song performed was Subaru's original song 'ぷれあです！' (Pleades!). The second song matched the reference JSON ('SPEED') perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Completely discarded the mismatched 'BLUE CLAPPER' reference lyrics and manually transcribed/translated 'ぷれあです！' and the MC talk. Fully utilized the 'SPEED' reference lyrics, aligning and dividing them precisely. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles tightly with the audio vocal bursts. Truncated durations where rapid speech occurred to prevent cascading delays, ensuring semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: オッケーです！スバルチャンネル！
subtitles.english: Okay! Subaru Channel!

subtitles.original: Everyday 何があっても みんなで
subtitles.english: Everyday, no matter what happens, let's all...

subtitles.original: ブルーな気持ちに スバっと駆けつけ
subtitles.english: Rushing to your blue feelings in Subaru style,

subtitles.original: お助けしちゃうヒーロー
subtitles.english: I'm a hero who will rescue you!

subtitles.original: 弱いハートじゃ いられないから
subtitles.english: Because I can't stay with a weak heart,

subtitles.original: つよつよでいきましょう！
subtitles.english: let's go strong and tough!

subtitles.original: ハラハラな水着で
subtitles.english: In a thrilling swimsuit,

subtitles.original: ドキドキのときめきタイム
subtitles.english: it's heart-pounding exciting time!

subtitles.original: いつでもおいでよ 一年中パラダイス
subtitles.english: Come on over anytime, a paradise all year round!

subtitles.original: カウントダウン
subtitles.english: Countdown!

subtitles.original: 曇り空 吹き飛ばそう
subtitles.english: Let's blow away the cloudy skies!

subtitles.original: 上がれサマー！もっとうまく
subtitles.english: Rise up, summer! Better yet,

subtitles.original: 暗闇の中も 眩しく照らす
subtitles.english: brightly illuminating even the darkness.

subtitles.original: 君に見つけてもらえた
subtitles.english: Just having you find me,

subtitles.original: それだけでも素晴らしい運命なんだ<
subtitles.english: that alone is a wonderful destiny.

subtitles.original: もっとずっと 道は続いてく
subtitles.english: The road keeps going on and on,

subtitles.original: 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: towards our dreams.

subtitles.original: いっしょに生きてくれるかな
subtitles.english: Will you live together with me?

subtitles.original: その手をとって走れ
subtitles.english: Take that hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよ みんなで
subtitles.english: I'll take you along, everyone together!

subtitles.original: 囁く 恥ずかしいけれど
subtitles.english: Whispering is embarrassing, but...

subtitles.original: 伝えたい想い
subtitles.english: the feelings I want to convey,

subtitles.original: 今なら言える
subtitles.english: I can say them now.

subtitles.original: 君のエールが 力になるよ
subtitles.english: Your cheers give me strength.

subtitles.original: いつも元気を 分けてくれて
subtitles.english: Always sharing your energy with me.

subtitles.original: 頑張っていけるんだ
subtitles.english: I can keep doing my best,

subtitles.original: 笑って過ごせるんだ 本当に
subtitles.english: I can spend my days laughing, truly.

subtitles.original: ありがとうのこの気持ちを
subtitles.english: With these feelings of gratitude,

subtitles.original: 歌えサマー！もっと
subtitles.english: sing out, summer! More,

subtitles.original: 輝きの中も 強いきらめき
subtitles.english: an even stronger sparkle in the midst of brightness.

subtitles.original: 君に届いているかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if it's reaching you?

subtitles.original: 1ミリでも伝わればいいな
subtitles.english: If even a single millimeter gets through, that would be great.

subtitles.original: もっとずっと 道は続いてく
subtitles.english: The road keeps going on and on,

subtitles.original: 夢に向かって
subtitles.english: towards our dreams.

subtitles.original: いっしょに生きてくれるかな
subtitles.english: Will you live together with me?

subtitles.original: その手をとって走れ
subtitles.english: Take that hand and run!

subtitles.original: 連れていくよ みんなで
subtitles.english: I'll take you along, everyone together!

subtitles.original: 君とかける スバルチャンネル
subtitles.english: Running with you, Subaru Channel!

subtitles.original: スバル先輩ありがとうございました！Koboでした！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Subaru-senpai! This was Kobo!

subtitles.original: コボ頑張れー！
subtitles.english: Do your best, Kobo!

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとうー！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: 誰かのための痛み？
subtitles.english: A pain for someone?

subtitles.original: 僕の願い、やがて散り散り
subtitles.english: My wish will soon be scattered.

subtitles.original: 椅子取りゲームみたい
subtitles.english: Like a game of musical chairs,

subtitles.original: それでも、息をしていくしかない
subtitles.english: but even so, I have no choice but to keep breathing.

subtitles.original: まだ、聞こえるか？
subtitles.english: Can you still hear it?

subtitles.original: とっくのとうに詰まった呼吸
subtitles.english: A breath that was choked up long ago.

subtitles.original: 関係ない、うるせえわ
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter, shut up!

subtitles.original: 自分だけが聞こえている
subtitles.english: I'm the only one who can hear it.

subtitles.original: 安定なんて捨てた
subtitles.english: I threw away stability.

subtitles.original: もう、すべてを振り切るスピードで
subtitles.english: Already, at a speed that shakes off everything.

subtitles.original: その瞬間まで、足掻いて ただ、脳絞って
subtitles.english: Struggling until that moment, just squeezing my brain

subtitles.original: 今、見えるとこまで
subtitles.english: to as far as I can see now.

subtitles.original: この瞬間を飲み干して、また踊って
subtitles.english: Drinking down this moment and dancing again,

subtitles.original: 見たことないもの、見せて
subtitles.english: show me something I've never seen before.

subtitles.original: 「君の代わりはいない」
subtitles.english: There's no substitute for you.

subtitles.original: もし、誰かが否定しても
subtitles.english: Even if someone denies it,

subtitles.original: 僕の代わりはいない
subtitles.english: there's no substitute for me.

subtitles.original: 違うことない、僕の目覚まし
subtitles.english: There's no mistake, it's my awakening.

subtitles.original: 誰かの祈る手を払った痛み
subtitles.english: The pain of brushing away someone's praying hand,

subtitles.original: どこから漂う悪意の兆し
subtitles.english: a sign of malice drifting from somewhere.

subtitles.original: 正しさに息を潜めた怒り
subtitles.english: The anger that held its breath in righteousness,

subtitles.original: それすらも僕に残った光
subtitles.english: even that is the light left to me.

subtitles.original: 誰彼の熱を奪う感覚
subtitles.english: The sensation of robbing anyone and everyone's heat,

subtitles.original: 逃げる気はとうにないぜ、全く
subtitles.english: I have absolutely no intention of escaping.

subtitles.original: この手が震えるほどの錯覚が、起こした摩擦
subtitles.english: The friction caused by the illusion that made my hand tremble.

subtitles.original: まだ、見えてるか？
subtitles.english: Can you still see it?

subtitles.original: とっくにスポットライトを奪った
subtitles.english: I've already stolen the spotlight long ago.

subtitles.original: 関係ない、うるせえわ
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter, shut up!

subtitles.original: 自分だけに聞かせている
subtitles.english: I'm only letting myself hear it.

subtitles.original: 安定なんてやめだ
subtitles.english: Stop with the stability.

subtitles.original: もう、すべてを振り切るスピードで
subtitles.english: Already, at a speed that shakes off everything.

subtitles.original: この瞬間だけ、足掻いたって意味ないぜ
subtitles.english: Struggling just for this moment is meaningless,

subtitles.original: 今、見えるとこまで
subtitles.english: to as far as I can see now.

subtitles.original: 第六感で惹きあって、また踊って
subtitles.english: Attracting each other with our sixth sense, and dancing again,

subtitles.original: 見たことないものを見せて
subtitles.english: show me something I've never seen before.

subtitles.original: 今をブチ抜いて！
subtitles.english: Break through the present!

subtitles.original: もう、ノンストップで脳、擦り切れるまで
subtitles.english: Already, non-stop, until our brains wear out.

subtitles.original: この瞬間を飲み干して、また踊って
subtitles.english: Drinking down this moment and dancing again,

subtitles.original: 見たことないもの、見せて
subtitles.english: show me something I've never seen before.
